title: selaginella eurynota
intro: Selaginella eurynota, also known as the spiny spike moss, is a type of evergreen, perennial plant that belongs to the genus Selaginella, a group of plants commonly known as spikemosses or resurrection plants. The spiny spike moss is known for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, making it useful in treating various health conditions such as arthritis, bronchitis, and skin issues. In addition to its medicinal properties, the plant has been found to have numerous health benefits, including reducing stress and anxiety, improving respiratory health, and acting as an immune system booster. The spiny spike moss can be used in various herbal preparations, including teas, infusions, and topical creams, allowing for a range of applications in traditional medicine and modern herbalism.
